Instagram Inquiry

Kaity Kissed Nails and Designs brings glamour and elegance to your special day. We specialise in bridal nail artistry that complements your wedding look perfectly.

From classic French tips to bold, intricate designs, every nail is crafted with precision and creativity. We work with brides and bridal parties to ensure each set is flawless and lasts through all the celebrations.

We love collaborating with clients to bring their vision to life, offering personalised consultations and a relaxed, joyful experience. Every detail matters — because your hands deserve to shine as brightly as your love.
